title: senecio frigidus var. tomentosus
intro: Senecio frigidus var. tomentosus, commonly known as the woolly Jacob's ladder or tomentose Jacob's ladder, is a plant species in the daisy family native to the western coast of North America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating various health issues such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The plant has been traditionally used to promote digestion, relieve coughs, and treat fever, among other health benefits. Senecio frigidus var. tomentosus can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal medicine to support overall health and well-being.
